channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flypostering, 13th June
item.description:
Deals Gateeay by bus turn around. Please remove flypostering from traffic light control Vox

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Deptford Bridge, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Previously reported, replied 'fixed' but not fixed! Bus stop flag E in Bromley Rd, Beckenham, 20m S of jct with High St Beckenham, outside St George's Church - timetables missing., 13th June
item.description:
Previously reported, replied 'fixed' but not fixed! Bus stop flag E in Bromley Rd, Beckenham, 20m S of jct with High St Beckenham, outside St George's Church - timetables missing. Bus stop flag timetables displays - only the 227 and N3 timetables are visible. The 227 timetable has slipped down over an unknown timetable and the fourth timetable is missing. In short, the 162 and 367 timetables are not on display. The timetables importantly show the routes the buses take. Please also add a bus spider map to the shelter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin has been removed, 13th June
item.description:
Bin has been removed. It’s causing litter to be left on the street and outside our house and front door. Why has the bin been removed and when will it be replaced?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Clothes scattered on pavement. Also ladder abandoned under the stairs., 13th June
item.description:
Clothes scattered on pavement and a ladder under the stairs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Villiers Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urgent - huge amount of brokem glass all over road, 13th June
item.description:
Some smashed a few bottles in the middle of the road and it is impossible for cyclists to remain on the road safely. Would you please kindly clean very urgently?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vartry Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large, deep pothole on railway bridge., 13th June
item.description:
This is on a bridge, which is narrow. To avoid the hole so not to cause damage to your car you have to swerve onto the other side of the road and oncoming traffic. This pothole has been present for several weeks. It has been ‘repaired’ before but has reoccurred.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 232, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Report 2: Bus shelter in Beckenham Hill Rd southbound at the jct with Primrose Close, Catford Southend - pen tag on grey solid panel., 13th June
item.description:
Report 2: Bus shelter in Beckenham Hill Rd southbound at the jct with Primrose Close, Catford Southend - pen tag on grey solid panel. Seen from moving bus so no photo.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Bus shelter in Beckenham Hill Rd southbound opposite the jct with Highland Croft, Beckenham - Illegible acid etched tag on glass narrow upper end pane., 13th June
item.description:
Bus shelter in Beckenham Hill Rd southbound opposite the jct with Highland Croft, Beckenham - Illegible acid etched tag on glass narrow upper end pane. Seen from moving bus so no photo.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Hill Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 13th June
item.description:
This car has been abandoned in the much needed parking bay for over eight weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: At the jct of Shannon Way and Southend Rd, Beckenham the Give Way sign is rotated 90° away from oncoming traffic from the side road., 13th June
item.description:
At the jct of Shannon Way and Southend Rd, Beckenham the Give Way sign is rotated 90° away from oncoming traffic from the side road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Seriously fire-damaged bus shelter, ceiling, lamp and wall - Crystal Palace Park Rd, Penge northbound, situated about 30m NE of the jct with Thicket Rd., 13th June
item.description:
Seriously fire-damaged bus shelter, ceiling, lamp and wall - Crystal Palace Park Rd, Penge northbound, situated about 30m NE of the jct with Thicket Rd. Seen Sat 13/6/26 2pm. The FixMyStreet system only offers me the bus stop on the opposite side of the road and won't let me choose the correct stop. Please fix FixMyStreet too.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lorry, 13th June
item.description:
The lorry with a vehicle on on it has been abandoned in the parking bay for 8 weeks. It is occupying a valuable parking space.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Cray Valley Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 13th June
item.description:
Fly tipping (again). Corner of Creekside and Copperas Street SE8.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Little Thames Walk, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Newlands Park footway opposite Newlands Parade shops, nr Penge East Station, what looks like the electrical insides of a Thames Water 1m high, grey, octagonal bollard have been left on the public footway beside the bollard, 13th June
item.description:
Newlands Park footway opposite Newlands Parade shops, nr Penge East Station, what looks like the electrical insides of a Thames Water 1m high, grey, octagonal bollard have been left on the public footway beside the bollard. Seen Friday 12/6/26 1pm. I have filled in the TW Web form on 13/6/26 but it was difficult to use the report form, the map and there was no means of uploading the photos.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 13th June
item.description:
Large pothole

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lombard Wall, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faulty drain cover causing massive noise pollution, 13th June
item.description:
A loose drain cover between the traffic lights and bus stop in Cavendish Road between the traffic lights and the bus stop at the Common end is causing massive noise pollution for the surrounding streets. Please fix it! This has been going on for many months now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cavendish Road, Clapham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kilburn High Road/Ladbrokes - Graffiti MUST Be Removed, 13th June
item.description:
This gang graffiti outside the exploitative gambling company Ladbrokes has been reported numerous times, and remains on full show. First Brent Council claimed it was removed (Reference: 8957446), then they claimed they are unable to remove it (Reference: 9504533). This failure to act and communicate is unacceptable. Residents should not have to tolerate gang infested gambling spots.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Anti social behaviour, 13th June
item.description:
There are young adults/teens on motorbikes riding on the grass causing noise disturbance. They hang around in front of the shops causing problems entering the restaurants and its scary to go for a walk. They stole a childs football today then disappeared we couldnt find them. Its been reported to the police multiple times. They always litter aswell there was a whole sofa in the grass area a few weeks ago. They wear balaclavas. Worried there will be gang fights here soon please sort this out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Harvist 113, 13th June
item.description:
Blue bags left for more than 5 days attacking flying tipping.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harvist Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Litter, 13th June
item.description:
The street cleaners have stopped coming again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ruston Road, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet
